title: ExitCode
description: Reserved integer codes for all framework-managed exit conditions. Commands MUST reference named constants; literal integers are not permitted
x-enum-descriptions: Unclassified execution failure — use a more specific code whenever one exists.
Operation started but did not complete. External state may be partially modified. Do not retry without inspecting state.
Input validation failed before any side effect occurred. Safe to retry unconditionally after fixing the input.
A required precondition was not satisfied. No side effects occurred.
The addressed resource does not exist. No side effects occurred.
The resource already exists or a version conflict was detected. No side effects occurred.
The caller has valid credentials but lacks permission. Do not retry — escalate or stop.
Credentials are missing, invalid, or expired. Read error.code for detail: TOKEN_EXPIRED allows auto-refresh; TOKEN_MISSING requires credential acquisition.
A payment is required to proceed. Attempt x402 payment if the agent has payment permission, then retry.
The operation exceeded its time limit. External state may be partially modified. Retry after back-off.
An upstream rate limit was hit. No side effects occurred. Retry after error.retry_after seconds.
The service is temporarily unavailable. No side effects occurred. Retry with exponential back-off.
The command or flag does not exist at this path. Read error.redirect for the replacement. If error.redirect.permanent is true, memorize and never call the old form again.

x-code-ranges.14-63: framework extensions — reserved for future use
x-code-ranges.79-125: command-specific — must be declared per REQ-C-001
